raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> i made an online purchase of hair extensions from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  for {$110.00} On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX and XXXX i contacted XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  by phone to make arrangements to return the item for a full refund under the XXXX  day policy. I left XXXX messages but the company never responded. I then filed a dispute with BARCLAYS BANK on XX/XX/year>. Today BARCLAYS BANK closed the investigation in favor of the merchant. BARCLAYS explanation as that my complaint was denied because I still had the merchandise and the dispute was under the category.... item received was not as described. That is totally false and miscategorized. I spoke to the agent on the phone and was told that there's nothing else that can be done.
